what_it_does: A Supabase CLI temp-state file recording the latest known CLI version. Contains the single string 'v2.107.0'.
observations: Lives under supabase/.temp, which the sibling .gitignore ignores
conventions: Generated Supabase CLI cache file (normally gitignored)
notes: A generated Supabase CLI cache file noting the latest CLI version (v2.107.0) — not authored content.
intention_signals: Caches the latest detected Supabase CLI version for update checks.
contribution: Contributes the cached latest-CLI-version marker (v2.107.0) for the Supabase workspace.
summary_for_embedding: A Supabase CLI temp cache file recording the latest CLI version 'v2.107.0'.
intention_for_embedding: To cache the latest known Supabase CLI version for the local workspace's update check.
